description: Reboot an Amazon MSK broker to validate Kafka producer and consumer resilience to broker failures

rebootMskBroker.description: Reboot the specified MSK broker and wait for the cluster to return to ACTIVE

parameters.documentParameters: {"ClusterArn": "<YOUR MSK CLUSTER ARN>", "BrokerId": "1", "AutomationAssumeRole": "arn:aws:iam::<YOUR AWS ACCOUNT>:role/<YOUR SSM ROLE NAME>"}
